name: Quincunx
description: Five-spot quincunx dots like dice, re-rolling their colours and turning on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: radial-gradient(circle at 26% 26%, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)) 16%, transparent 18%), radial-gradient(circle at 74% 26%, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)) 16%, transparent 18%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)) 16%, transparent 18%), radial-gradient(circle at 26% 74%, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)) 16%, transparent 18%), radial-gradient(circle at 74% 74%, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)) 16%, transparent 18%); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
